channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Pro Football Hall of Famer Randy Moss reveals cancer diagnosis, 6-hour surgery
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver Randy Moss said Friday he is being treated for cancer and is recovering from major surgery. In an appearance on Instagram Live, Moss, aided by a cane, introduced himself as a cancer survivor and thanked his “prayer warriors” for their support.
item.dc:creator: ZACH ALLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trae Young, Hawks hoping to win big in Vegas at the NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Trae Young might be the NBA's biggest enigma. Young's fans can point to numbers and say he's an elite player. His detractors can point to numbers and say he's overrated. Both arguments have validity. To some, his cocky ways are endearing. To others, they're infuriating.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lindsey Vonn to enter World Cup ski races next weekend in Switzerland in her comeback at age 40
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn will return to World Cup ski racing next weekend for a pair of super-G events in St. Moritz, Switzerland, as she continues her comeback at 40 years old. Vonn teased her return in an Instagram post through her sponsor, Red Bull, on Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark White privilege comment sparks intense, personal argument between Riley Gaines and Jemele Hill
item.description: Riley Gaines' latest online spat with a left-leaning figure came against journalist Jemele Hill regarding Caitlin Clark's recent 'White privilege' comments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: Tagovailoa sealed it with a 10-yard touchdown pass to Jonnu Smith in overtime to help the Dolphins spoil Rodgers' first 300-yard passing game in nearly three years and beat the Jets for the ninth straight time in Miami.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Willy Adames agrees to $182 million, 7-year deal with the Giants, AP source says
item.description: Willy Adames has agreed to a $182 million, seven-year contract with San Francisco, providing the Giants with a power-hitting shortstop in the prime of his career, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KRON4
